description_long: This is a classic brown leather dress shoe with a smooth, polished finish and a rounded toe. The upper is made from a single piece of leather, featuring a standard criss-cross lacing system with five eyelets on each side and thin, matching brown laces. The shoe has a low, stacked black heel and a slightly raised sole, both of which are stitched to the upper with visible white thread. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter tan material, providing a subtle contrast to the rich brown exterior. The overall silhouette is sleek and formal, suitable for business or dress occasions in urban environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A polished brown leather dress shoe with classic lacing and a low black heel, featuring a smooth, formal design and visible white stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, symmetrical lacing, and smooth leather upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shoe's low heel, stitched sole, and uninterrupted leather surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel, back seam, and open collar with visible interior lining.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the shoe's profile, heel, and stitching details.
